stemHtml:
Given the following information, calculate the estimated estimated Landing Mass at the destination for the Commercial Air Transport flight with a Performance Class A aeroplane. Assume the Basic Fuel Scheme WITHOUT variations applies.

Remaining useable fuel: 2100 lb
DOM: 9900 lb
Traffic Load: 3160 lb
Remaining Trip Fuel to Destination: 800 lb
Destination Alternate Fuel: 485 lb
Final Reserve Fuel: 420 lb
Extra fuel: 0 lb
Discretionary Fuel: 0 lb
